name: Inkling
description: Inkling is Thinking Machines Lab's open-weights multimodal mixture-of-experts model for customizable AI systems. It accepts text, image, and audio inputs and produces text outputs.

details.name: training_tokens
details.value: 45T tokens across text, images, audio, and video

details.name: availability_note
details.value: Full weights are available on Hugging Face. Tinker exposes Inkling for sampling and fine-tuning, Together AI offers serverless inference, and Baseten offers Model API inference.

details.name: confirmed_api_providers
details.value: Tinker (beta sampling and fine-tuning API); Together AI (serverless); Baseten (Model API)
